creator: tota@FreeBSD.org
text:
It seems that mailman-2.14.7+j7 has been already added CSRFcheck feature [1] corresponding to a patch [2] to fix CVE-2016-6893.

http://bazaar.launchpad.net/~tkikuchi/mailman/2.1-japan/revision/1328 [1]
http://bazaar.launchpad.net/~mailman-coders/mailman/2.1/revision/1668 [2]
